description: This scenario tests the ability to download the OpenAPI specification and ensure it is correctly formatted for offline review.
steps: Navigate to the RoostGPT Test Dashboard.
Locate the 'API docs by Redocly' link and click it.
On the API documentation page, find the 'Download' button.
Click the 'Download' button to initiate the OpenAPI specification download.
Verify the download is successful and the file is saved locally.
Open the downloaded OpenAPI specification file.
Validate the JSON/YAML format of the downloaded specification.
Check for any syntax errors or formatting issues.
Use an OpenAPI viewer/editor to open the file and ensure it is structured correctly.
Review the endpoints and operations listed in the specification.
Verify that the downloaded specification matches the current live API documentation.
expected_results: Downloaded file is free of syntax errors.
Specification matches the current API documentation.
edge_cases: File is corrupted or incomplete after download.
Specification format is not recognized by editors.
Mismatch between downloaded and live API documentation.
data_requirements: Access to the internet for download.
Disk space to save the specification file.
Access to current API documentation for comparison.
dependencies: OpenAPI viewer/editor installed on local machine.
api_interactions: Monitor download request for the OpenAPI specification.
Validate response headers and content type of the download.
Check for any API call errors during the download process.
performance_metrics: Measure download time for the OpenAPI specification.
Evaluate the time taken to open and parse the specification.
Check for responsiveness of the API documentation page.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure download button is accessible via keyboard.
Verify screen readers announce download progress.
Check color contrast for download link and buttons.
